Sites.name: Essence Tracker
Sites.description: Track essence priorities, find optimal engraving matches, and use the built-in checker to sort weapons faster.

Sites.name: DataField
Sites.description: Tools, tests and data will continue to be added/modified every day.

Sites.name: Talos Pioneers
Sites.description: Discover and share Endfield Blueprints on Talos Pioneers, the Arknights: Endfield community platform for Endministrators to collaborate and exchange strategies.

Sites.name: RotationForge
Sites.description: Forge your rotations. RotationForge is built around combat rotations: choose a team, place skills on a timeline, inspect triggers and cooldowns, then share the exact sequence with other players.

Wiki.name: Endfield Talos Wiki
Wiki.description:
The Endfield Talos Wiki is an unofficial, community-driven encyclopedia of the real-time 3D RPG game, Arknights: Endfield, currently hosting 4,374 articles.
All contributors are encouraged to review the Policies and Guidelines before making edits or additions to the wiki.
